server.heading: OVMS Server
server.description: Start the OpenVINO Model Server on port 9000 (REST {{port}}).

chat.empty_ready: Send a message to start chatting.
chat.empty_no_model: Select a model above to begin.
chat.server_not_running: OVMS server is not running. Go to the Models Server tab and start it first.
chat.no_text_gen_models: No text-generation or image-text-to-text models installed. Go to the Models tab to pull or export one.

benchmark.default_prompt: Describe the benefits of AI in one sentence.
benchmark.no_models: No text-generation models installed. Go to the Models tab to pull or export one.
benchmark.server_not_running: OVMS server is not running. Go to the Models Server tab and start it first.

settings.setup_folder_help: Base directory where OVMS will be installed.
settings.ovms_download_url_help: URL to the OVMS zip archive for Windows.
settings.uv_download_url_help: URL to download uv.exe used for setting up the export environment.
settings.rest_api_port_help: Port for the local REST API (default: 3333). Requires restart to take effect.
settings.ovms_rest_port_help: Port the OVMS inference server listens on (default: 8080). Requires restart to take effect.
settings.log_level_help: OVMS server log verbosity. Requires restart to take effect.
settings.search_limit_help: Max number of models returned per search (default 30).
settings.model_categories_help: Choose which model categories are available in the Models tab.
settings.search_tags_help: Clickable shortcuts on the Export search. Press Enter to add.

confirm.reset_ovms: This will delete the OVMS installation and re-download it. Continue?
confirm.update_ovms: This will download and install the latest OVMS version. Continue?
confirm.reset_models: This will delete the models folder and all config JSON files. Continue?
confirm.delete_model_question: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
confirm.delete_model_warning: This will remove the model from config.json and delete its files.
